title: Phenol
summary: 9701 A Level phenol — acidity, ring activation, and electrophilic substitution.
learningObjectives: Explain acidity of phenol vs alcohols.
Describe nitration and bromination of phenol.

simpleExplanation.title: Activated aromatic alcohol
simpleExplanation.summary: The –OH group donates electron density into the ring, making ortho/para substitution easy and weak acid behaviour.

sections.content: **Phenol** (32.2) links **arenes** (30.1) and **alcohols** (32.1). Compare **reagents and conditions** with benzene and ethanol.
